notes: Verbatim subset of Mailgun's official OpenAPI 3.1.0 spec (info.version 3.0.0, converted from YAML to JSON). Endpoint/schema definitions and examples are unmodified from upstream; only the path set was narrowed and its transitive component-schema closure retained. Covers what the adaptor uses: the send() operation maps to POST /v3/{domain_name}/messages (mailgun.js client.messages.create). Also included from the same official spec: MIME send, retrieve stored message, and mailing-list + list-member CRUD, which the underlying mailgun.js client exposes. Servers kept as upstream (https://api.mailgun.net, EU alt), with /v3 carried in the paths. Email-validation endpoints live in a separate Mailgun spec (openapi-validate-final) and are not included.
